creator: fmysh@iijmio-mail.jp
text:
Update PyTables to 2.0.3.
		There is a migration notes to 1.x users in MIGRATING_TO_2.x.txt.

		Some modifications to the port:
		-PORTNAME is changed to pytables because it's the name of the project.
		-The dependency on Pyrex is unconditional.
		-The dependency on numarray is changed to NumPy.
		-Documents and examples are intstalled, being controled by NOPORTDOCS and NOPORTEXAMPLES.
		-pkg-plist.
